top_signals.title: LivaNova to Present at Goldman Sachs Global Healthcare Conference in June
top_signals.summary: LivaNova PLC (Nasdaq: LIVN), a market-leading medical technology company, today announced it will present at the Goldman Sachs 47th Annual Global Healthcare Conference in Miami Beach, Fla. Vladimir Makatsaria, Chief Executive Officer of LivaNova; Alex Shvartsburg, Chief Financial Officer; and Phil Kowalczyk, Chief Strategy and Corporate Development Officer, will participate in a fireside chat on [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
